title: Origins Manhunt
description: Person run from other people, but with cool powers
body:
Welp, my friends wanted an origins manhunt modpack, and I figured it would be easier for us to use if it were uploaded on modrinth, so here it is.

This modpack features a simple to use manhunt mod. Simple type "/mh join hunters/runners" to get started. Hunters get a compass than can be used to track the runner.

To spice up the manhunt experience, there are numerous origins to choose from, providing unique benefits and drawbacks to each person.

I recommend using this wheel we made to choose an origin for each person: [https://spinthewheel.io/wheels/XbtQ0giEE625boyTERl1cz0xJmU9MQ==](https://spinthewheel.io/wheels/XbtQ0giEE625boyTERl1cz0xJmU9MQ==)

There are also a bunch of optimization mods so everyone playing can do so smoothly, and the Essential Mod to easily play with friends.
